description_long: This object is a gravestone or headstone, typically found in a cemetery or graveyard. It is constructed from a solid, brownish stone material and features a rectangular base with a slightly tapered, upright slab. The front face is adorned with a carved cross, which has ornate, decorative edges, adding a solemn and respectful touch. The top of the headstone is rounded, with subtle carved details that give it a traditional and dignified appearance. The back and sides are plain, with no visible inscriptions or embellishments, emphasizing its functional and commemorative purpose.
description: A brown stone gravestone with a rounded top and a decorative cross carved on the front. The design is traditional and solemn, with plain sides and back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the decorative cross carving and the main face of the gravestone.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness and the rounded top profile of the gravestone.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned surface with the same rounded top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the gravestone's thickness and base.
